option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: #--------------- Microservice AI --------------- microservice-ai: # eureka-server and api-gateway services will be added here before running the full stack
microservice-account: build: context: ./microservice-account dockerfile: Dockerfile ports: - "8083:8080" networks: - microservices-network
microservice-transactions: build: context: ./microservice-ai dockerfile: Dockerfile environment: - EUREKA_SERVER_URL=http://eureka-server:8761/eureka - TRANSACTION_DB_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/finance_app_db - TRANSACTION_DB_USERNAME=postgres - TRANSACTION_DB_PASSWORD=postgres ports: - "8082:8080" - "8082:8082" networks: - microservices-network environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL} SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME} SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD} AI_API_URL: ${AI_API_URL}
depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy
#--------------- PostgreSQL Database --------------- postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine restart: unless-stopped environment: POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER} POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD} POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB} ports: - "5430:5432" volumes: - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./db_setup.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/db_setup.sql:ro - "8084:8080" networks: - microservices-network healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER} -d ${POSTGRES_DB}"] interval: 5s timeout: 3s retries: 10
networks: microservices-network: driver: bridge
volumes: pgdata:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: #--------------- Microservice AI --------------- microservice-ai: # eureka-server and api-gateway services will be added here before running the full stack
microservice-account: build: context: ./microservice-account dockerfile: Dockerfile ports: - "8083:8080" networks: - microservices-network
microservice-transactions: build: context: ./microservice-ai dockerfile: Dockerfile environment: - EUREKA_SERVER_URL=http://eureka-server:8761/eureka - TRANSACTION_DB_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/finance_app_db - TRANSACTION_DB_USERNAME=postgres - TRANSACTION_DB_PASSWORD=postgres ports: - "8082:8080" - "8082:8082" networks: - microservices-network environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL} SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME} SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD} AI_API_URL: ${AI_API_URL}
depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy
#--------------- PostgreSQL Database --------------- postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine restart: unless-stopped environment: POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER} POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD} POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB} ports: - "5430:5432" volumes: - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./db_setup.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/db_setup.sql:ro - "8084:8080" networks: - microservices-network healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER} -d ${POSTGRES_DB}"] interval: 5s timeout: 3s retries: 10
networks: microservices-network: driver: bridge
volumes: pgdata:

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
